documents.content: Powerhouse Gym membership price is ₹1299 per month. Quarterly plan available at ₹3,499.
Powerhouse Gym timing is 6AM to 11PM, all 7 days of the week.
Powerhouse Gym focuses on bodybuilding, HIIT, and functional training. Membership includes personal trainer sessions.
Powerhouse Gym tips: High-protein diet, track your progress, maintain consistency, and get 8 hours of sleep.
